zh.lifeSummary: 當Remigius Maulick於大約1552年出生在德國爾特波格可萊斯 布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫時，他的父親David Maulik33歲，母親Katarina Eckhart28歲。他於1577年4月23日與Anna Bentzen在德國爾特波格可萊斯 布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Remigius Maulick于大约1552年出生在德国爾特波格可萊斯 布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫时，他的父亲David Maulik33岁，母亲Katarina Eckhart28岁。他于1577年4月23日与Anna Bentzen在德国爾特波格可萊斯 布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Maulick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Rajiv, Ashish, Ashok, Babu, Bawa, Debashish, Deepa, Dhiraj, Dilip, Kalpana, Kaushik, Manish.  Arabic/Muslim Kamal, Mohammed, Abdur, Abid, Abida, Ali, Azhar, Farooq, Imtiaz, Irfan, Karem, Khalid.
Indian and Bangladeshi: variant of   Malik   1. Compare   Malick   4.
Variant of   Malick   1, a surname of Czech, Slovak, Ukrainian, Polish, and Slovenian origin (see   Malik   2 and 3).

variants.name: Malik
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Abdul, Mohammad, Khalid, Tariq, Muhammad, Ahmed, Shahid, Javed, Ali, Ghulam, Mohammed, Zafar.  Indian Krishan, Ashok, Chander, Rajesh, Ashish, Asim, Rajiv, Rohit, Sanjay, Arun, Kiran, Madan.

Muslim (mainly Pakistan), Indian (mainly Punjab), and Assyrian/Chaldean: from a personal name based on Arabic malik ‘king’; or, especially in the Indian subcontinent, a status name for a headman of a village or a tribal leader derived from the same title. Al-Malik ‘the King’ is an attribute of Allah, ‘the king of mankind’ (Koran 114:2), giving rise to the compound name ʿAbd al-Malik, ʿAbdul-Malik (see Abdelmalek and Abdulmalik ). Compare Mallick .

Ukrainian and Rusyn (standard transliteration Malyk); Czech and Slovak (mainly Malík, also Málik); Polish, Sorbian, and Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, derived from Ukrainian malyy, Czech and Slovak malý, Polish and Sorbian mały, Slovenian mal ‘small, little’. It is a cognate of Malec and Malek . Compare Malic and Malick .

variants.name: Mallik
meanings: Indian and Bangladeshi: variant of   Mallick  .

en.lifeSummary: When Remigius Maulick was born about 1552, in Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Württemberg, Germany, his father, David Maulik, was 33 and his mother, Katarina Eckhart, was 28. He married Anna Bentzen on 23 April 1577, in Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Remigius Maulick est né environ 1552, à Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, David Maulik, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Katarina Eckhart, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Anna Bentzen le 23 avril 1577, à Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Remigius Maulick um 1552 in Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Maulik 33 und seine Mutter Katarina Eckhart 28. Er hat am 23. April 1577 in Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Deutschland Anna Bentzen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter.

Lui sposato Anna Bentzen il 23 aprile 1577, nel Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie.

ko.Evangelisch, Dürrenzimmern, Landkreis He: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 헤이브론 브라c켄하임 드u렌지머
ko.lifeSummary: Remigius Maulick(이)가 대략 1552년 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브라c켄하임 드u렌지머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Maulik(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Katarina Eckhart(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1577년 4월 23일 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브라c켄하임 드u렌지머에서 Anna Bentzen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Remigius Maulick nasceu aproximadamente 1552, em Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, David Maulik, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Katarina Eckhart, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Bentzen em 23 de abril de 1577, em Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Remigius Maulick родился около 1552 г. в местности дuррензиммирн, крис браккеним, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени David Maulik было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Katarina Eckhart, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Bentzen 23 апреля 1577 г. в местности дuррензиммирн, крис браккеним, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей.

Se casó con Anna Bentzen el 23 de abril de 1577, en Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas.
